name: The Weighted Oath
specialty: Specializing in deciphering ancient texts and relics for clues about the Tower of Last Chance, setting them apart as the go-to team for scholars and academics in the Undercity.

members.name: Vaelra Elmsden
members.note: A stern woman with a scar running down her left cheek, rumored to have once been a member of the Argent Blades before leaving due to a disagreement

members.name: Thoren Blackstone
members.note: Known for his signature goggles and a peculiar habit of constantly whistling, Thoren is an expert in magical anomalies related to the rifts

members.name: Sylara Swiftwind
members.note: Sylara's agility and cat-like reflexes are legendary among the Wardens of Ash, but her past with the Iron Fang Consortium is a touchy subject

members.name: Zephyr Geargrinder
members.note: A towering, clockwork-powered warrior, Zephyr is often the silent strength that holds the group together, but he's known to have a mysterious connection to the Obsidian Lotus

visual: The four stand out in a crowd, dressed in dark cloaks with the Guild of Ashen Scrolls insignia on their shoulders. They carry themselves with an air of authority, moving with a quiet determination that speaks volumes about their professionalism.
reputation_note: The Weighted Oath is a team feared and respected in equal measure. Their services come at a high price, but those who can afford them know that their investment is likely to bring success.
